description: Phase 9 Part 4: QuantAI multi-app orchestration - make QuantAI safely operate across at least 5 apps in demo mode. Add a CrossAppOrchestrator service that uses the agent-runtime ExecutionEngine and typed tools to invoke actions across QuantMail, QuantChat, QuantDocs, QuantCalendar, and QuantDrive. Include demo scenarios: summarize-day (reads calendar + emails), draft-reply (reads email, composes reply), schedule-meeting (checks calendar, creates event), search-and-summarize (searches drive, summarizes file), chat-followup (reads chat, creates doc). All actions go through permission checks and approval queue. Add tests verifying the orchestration pipeline.
steps: Create apps/quantai/backend/services/cross-app-orchestrator.service.ts with CrossAppOrchestrator class that registers typed tools for 5 apps (mail.search, mail.draft, chat.getMessages, docs.create, calendar.getEvents, calendar.createEvent, drive.search, drive.summarize).
Implement 5 demo scenarios as methods: summarizeDay(), draftReply(emailId), scheduleMeeting(params), searchAndSummarize(query), chatFollowup(conversationId).
Each scenario constructs a plan (using PlanGenerator pattern from agent-runtime), checks permissions, executes steps, and returns structured results with citations.
Add apps/quantai/backend/services/demo-mode.service.ts that provides mock app connectors returning realistic demo data for each of the 5 apps.
Add tests in apps/quantai/backend/__tests__/cross-app-orchestrator.service.test.ts covering all 5 scenarios.
Run pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm lint to verify all gates pass
acceptance_criteria: CrossAppOrchestrator registers tools for 5 apps and executes demo scenarios
Each scenario produces structured results with citations/sources
Permission checks are enforced for each cross-app action
Demo mode provides realistic mock data without requiring real app backends
findings: All 14 tests pass. CrossAppOrchestrator registers typed tools for 5 apps (mail, chat, docs, calendar, drive) and provides 5 demo scenarios. DemoModeConnector returns realistic mock data. Orchestration routes registered at /api/v1/orchestrate/ prefix. Prettier reformatted files via lint-staged. All quality gates pass: typecheck, test (124 tests in quantai, all pass), build, lint.
